posts.author: mondayuser99 (Monday User)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently you cannot select “create new item below” while sorting is active

What are you trying to achieve

Allowing the creation of new items while sorting is active would let users maintain their preferred view while still inserting items. This would save users time on repetitive actions and supports more efficient data entry.
